project.project_title: Counter-Terror Analysis - 13-page counter-terror analytical narrative arc
project.source_strategy: Use sources to test whether each instrument actually improves analytic judgment: hypothesis discipline, bias control, decomposition, evidence weighting, confidence change, and human-AI division of labor.
project.distinctiveness_component_operation: run the task through the project's distinctive mechanism rather than summarizing the project in prose
project.distinctiveness_component_output: baseline, structured review, human correction, confidence boundary
project.acceptance_test: A reviewer can see why this project could not be swapped with another page without losing the mechanism.
project.best_improvement: Add a compact source-to-judgment example: input source, analytic instrument, inference made, rival interpretation, confidence limit, and downstream use.
project.build_status: source-backed proof build; needs source-to-output capture and close-read strengthening

components.source_action: Extract the method rule that this component must obey, then add that rule to the acceptance criteria. Component under review: Counter-Terror Analysis - 13-page counter-terror analytical narrative arc Runtime Or Interface Surface.
components.source_claim_ceiling: The source may guide structure and proof design from metadata routing, but public factual warrant requires close reading or already verified project evidence.
components.close_read_task: Close-read the assigned source for the exact rule, limitation, example, or mechanism that should alter Counter-Terror Analysis - 13-page counter-terror analytical narrative arc Runtime Or Interface Surface.
components.acceptance_tests: The input, operation, and expected output are all visible.; The evidence locator is present or the missing evidence is explicitly named.; The result supports the component claim without implying broader completion.
components.falsification_rule: The component fails if human review is ornamental and does not change, narrow, block, or justify the output.
components.distinctiveness_pressure: A reviewer must see what structured human judgment changed in the AI-supported output.
components.advanced_component_to_add_if_weak: delta board comparing baseline, SAT-supported review, adjudication, and final claim
components.next_build_step: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Counter-Terror Analysis - 13-page counter-terror analytical narrative arc Runtime Or Interface Surface; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.
